      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node with type parameters of type Node 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BitmapNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a bitmap.
      class  CircleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a circle.
      class  EllipseNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying an ellipse.
      class  NodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Abstract class to present a node in a diagram.
      class  RectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a rectangle.
      class  RoundRectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a round rectangle.
      class  SquareNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a square.

    • Uses of Node in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism with type parameters of type Node 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractAnchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the Anchor that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
      class  AbstractEdge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      Abstract ModelObject classe for representing edges between anchors.
      class  AbstractNode<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for nodes.
      interface  Anchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the connection point that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
      interface  Edge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      Abstract ModelObject class for representing edges between anchors.
      interface  Graph<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for graph models.
      interface  Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for nodes.

      Modifier and Type Class and Description

      This is the semantic object for nodes.

      Replies the node at the other side of this edge from the specified node.

      Define an node with at max one central anchor with the standard implementation.
